ip_outcome_note: Confirmed Rolycoly via PokemonTCG.io API card swsh2-105; National Pokedex no. 837, Rock-type, Generation VIII coal-chunk Pokemon introduced in Pokemon Sword & Shield.

trivia_bullets.text: Rolycoly (National Pokedex no. 837) is a pure Rock-type Pokemon introduced in Generation VIII, set in the UK-modeled Galar region. The Galar region's design draws heavily from Great Britain's industrial period, including its coal-mining economy.
sources: WebSearch: PokéJungle 'Rolycoly, Carkol, Coalossal — Origin of Species'

trivia_bullets.text: "Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago." The 400-year timeframe aligns with the early stages of the British Industrial Revolution coal-mining boom, grounding the species in Galar's period setting.

Rolycoly's Carkol evolution evokes a minecart (dark cart-like form rolling along mine tracks). Coalossal (final evolution, no. 839) is a towering coal furnace-form, completing the mine-to-furnace arc of the line's industrial metaphor.
sources: WebSearch: PokéJungle 'Rolycoly, Carkol, Coalossal — Origin of Species'

trivia_bullets.text: Rolycoly's hidden ability is Flash Fire (activated on Carkol and Coalossal), making the line relevant in competitive doubles as a Fire absorber for its partner.

related_cards.name: Carkol
related_cards.note: Stage-1 evolution; same coal/labor lore axis

related_cards.name: Coalossal
related_cards.note: Final evolution; furnace-form, completes the line

related_cards.name: Galar Mine
related_cards.note: Location card depicting the extractive site the line inhabits
